title: The Duel in the Mirror World
description: On pages 6–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Chiffon, Nami as Luffy and Katakuri push their duel to its emotional peak while Sanji moves the cake plan toward the escape route.
scene: Luffy and Katakuri turn their fight into a battle of respect, endurance, and future sight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Prickle Prickle...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: GAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Geh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Grilled...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: MOCH!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fufu... now that the cake is in our hands...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They won't be able to recklessly attack us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We'll arrive at Liqueur Island soon!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ha ha! That wasn't so terrible after all!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank good- mess we were able to repair our paddles and make it in time! Good job, everyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!! Thank you for your praise!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because of his current size, promethous is moving slug- gishly.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once we throw the cake onto liqueur island, we'll start our great escape- rero, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yeah, that's probably the best plan....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...No, not yet.

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: ...what's the matter, Chiffon?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Liqueur Island isn't far enough....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're going to have to lure them to puffs Island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey!! Are you out of your mind, Chiffon!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If Mama returns to normal after eating the cake at Liqueur Island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She'll still have enough time to catch up to Nami and the others!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So what!? Haven't we done enough already?! We'll lose our lives!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama's just getting hunger and hunger!! Look at her!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's keep going until we reach Puffs Island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait a second, Chiffon!!! Were you even listening!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Okay.

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 27 dialogue beats. Luffy and Katakuri push each other beyond technique, turning the fight into a test of conviction.
